basic_details.job_title: ESIC Hospital Jajmau Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 28 Specialist, Senior Resident Posts
basic_details.short_information: The latest Employees' State Insurance Corporation (ESIC) Recruitment 2026 has been announced for Specialist and Senior Resident posts! Published at the official website, this new recruitment drive offers 28 openings for eligible candidates. Applicants within the age group up to 69 years (Specialist) and up to 45 years (Senior Resident) and possessing MBBS with PG Degree or Diploma in the concerned specialty can attend the walk-in interview on 14 May 2026. Find all details about the ESIC Specialist and Senior Resident new vacancy 2026, including eligibility, application procedure, and notificat

age_limit.details: Full Time/Part Time Specialist: Maximum age limit is 69 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-serviceman is as per rules. Senior Resident (Contractual) on One Year Contract Basis: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-serviceman is as per rules. Senior Resident on Tenure Basis under 3 Years Residency Scheme: Maximum age limit is 45 years. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-serviceman is as per rules.

qualification.details: Full Time Contractual Specialist: PG Degree or Diploma in concerned specialty from Recognized University with 3 years' experience after acquiring the PG Degree OR minimum of 5 years' post diploma experience. Part Time Contractual Specialist: PG Degree or Diploma in concerned specialty from Recognized University with 3 years' experience after acquiring the PG Degree OR minimum of 5 years' post diploma experience. Accident & Emergency Department Specialist: MBBS degree, followed by a post graduate degree like an MD or MS in Emergency Medicine, or a similar specialty like Internal Medicine, Anesthesia or General Surgery with 3 years' experience after acquiring the PG Degree OR minimum of 5 years' post diploma experience. Senior Resident (Contractual) on One Year Contract Basis: MBBS Degree from recognized university with at least 2 years working experience in the same discipline. Preference is to be given to a PG Degree or a Diploma Qualified Candidate. Senior Resident on Tenure Basis under 3 Years Residency Scheme: PG Degree/Diploma from recognized university in the same discipline.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Resident (Contractual) on One Year Contract Basis
Senior Resident on Tenure Basis under 3 Years Residency Scheme

salary_details.details: Full Time Specialist: Rs. 1,41,899.00 (Level 11) or Rs. 1,65,165.00 (Level 12) per month. Part Time Specialist: Rs. 60,000.00 (fixed remuneration 16 hrs/week), Rs. 15,000.00 (emergency visit), Rs. 800/hr (additional hour). Senior Resident (One Year Contract): Rs. 1,11,976.00 (Level 10) per month. Senior Resident (3 Years Residency Scheme): Rs. 67,700 (Level-11) + allowances per month.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date for the Walk-in Interview for ESIC Hospital Jajmau Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The primary Walk-in Interview date is 14th May 2026. There is also a possibility of a Walk-in Interview on 8th May 2026 if vacancies remain unfilled.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Specialist and Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 28 vacancies for Specialist and Senior Resident posts at ESIC Hospital Jajmau.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Senior Resident posts?
faq.answer: For Senior Resident (One Year Contract), an MBBS Degree with at least 2 years of working experience is required. For Senior Resident (3 Years Residency Scheme), a PG Degree/Diploma in the same discipline is necessary.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The age limit for Full Time/Part Time Specialist posts is not exceeding 69 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the ESIC Hospital Jajmau Recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, UR/OBC candidates need to pay Rs. 300/- and SC/ST candidates need to pay Rs. 75/- as a Demand Draft. PWD & Female candidates are exempted.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for Full Time Specialist posts?
faq.answer: The salary for Full Time Specialist posts ranges from Rs. 1,41,899.00 (Level 11) to Rs. 1,65,165.00 (Level 12) per month.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for these posts?
faq.answer: These posts are to be applied for through a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to report at the venue on the specified date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What is the location of ESIC Hospital Jajmau?
faq.answer: ESIC Hospital Jajmau is located in Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 208010.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any relaxation in age limits for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/Ex-serviceman is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q10. Who should I contact for prior appointment before the interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must fix prior appointment with Mr. Kumar Subodh Prasad, Assistant Director (Admin) at Mob: 8130185454 or email at [email protected].
